The Problem

Poor Sleep Is Draining Your Life

Lying awake at 2am, staring at the ceiling with a mind that won't slow down. Day after day of exhaustion, brain fog, and irritability — and the harder you try to sleep, the worse it gets. Melatonin stopped working. Prescription sleep aids leave you groggy. You're stuck in a cycle you can't break.

The Solution

Deep Sleep, Naturally Restored

Our formula works with your body's own sleep systems — not against them. Our synergistic blend lowers cortisol, calms the nervous system, and supports every stage of your sleep cycle. No dependency. No grogginess. Just the deep, natural sleep your body has been craving.

[Product] Works In Phases

Days 1–7

Foundation Phase

The adaptogenic compounds begin absorbing into your system. Most customers notice it's easier to wind down at night and wake up feeling less groggy.

Days 8–21

Regulation Phase

Cortisol levels stabilise and your nervous system settles into a consistent rhythm. Falling asleep feels easier and staying asleep through the night becomes the norm.

Days 22–45

Transformation Phase

Deep, restorative sleep becomes reliable. Energy is noticeably higher during the day, brain fog lifts, and mood stabilises without the afternoon crash.

Day 45+

Peak Rest

The compounding effect reaches its peak. Consistent deep sleep every night, sustained daytime energy, and a calmer baseline that stays with you long term.

What's Inside Every Capsule

Six clinically studied ingredients, each chosen for a specific role in your sleep cycle. Nothing filler, nothing redundant.

Ashwagandha KSM-66

Stress & Cortisol Control

The gold-standard ashwagandha extract. Clinically shown to reduce cortisol by up to 28%, making it easier for your brain to transition into sleep mode.

Magnesium Glycinate

Deep Muscle Relaxation

The most bioavailable form of magnesium. Relaxes muscles, calms the nervous system, and supports the GABA receptors that regulate sleep.

L-Theanine

Alpha Brainwave Activity

Found naturally in green tea. Promotes alpha brainwave states — the relaxed-but-alert baseline your brain needs to transition into sleep without sedation.

Rhodiola Rosea

Stress Adaptation

A Scandinavian adaptogen shown to reduce stress-related fatigue and improve sleep quality in people with high stress load.

B-Complex

Mood & Nervous System

Full-spectrum B vitamins support serotonin production and regulate the nervous system signals that control your sleep-wake cycle.

Zinc Bisglycinate

Hormonal Balance

Chelated zinc with superior absorption. Supports melatonin production and hormonal balance for consistent, predictable sleep.

Ashwagandha KSM-66

Stress & Cortisol Control

The gold-standard ashwagandha extract. Clinically shown to reduce cortisol by up to 28%, making it easier for your brain to transition into sleep mode.

Magnesium Glycinate

Deep Muscle Relaxation

The most bioavailable form of magnesium. Relaxes muscles, calms the nervous system, and supports the GABA receptors that regulate sleep.

The Science Behind [Product]

Most sleep supplements throw melatonin at the problem and call it done. Our formula works differently. Our formula targets the three root causes of poor sleep — elevated cortisol, nervous system dysregulation, and micronutrient depletion — using adaptogens and minerals that have been clinically studied for this exact purpose.

Lower Cortisol, Fall Asleep Faster

Cortisol is the #1 reason people lie awake at night. KSM-66 Ashwagandha has been shown in multiple trials to reduce serum cortisol by up to 28% — creating the chemical environment your brain needs to wind down.

Activate Your Body's Off Switch

Magnesium Glycinate activates GABA receptors — the neurological brakes that slow down brain activity. Combined with L-Theanine's alpha brainwave promotion, your mind genuinely slows down instead of just feeling tired.

Stay in Deep Sleep Longer

The B-Complex and Zinc Bisglycinate in our formula support serotonin and melatonin production from the inside out, helping your body regulate its own sleep architecture naturally — so you cycle through all stages of restorative sleep.

Frequently Asked Questions

Many customers notice a difference within the first 1–3 nights. Full results — improved sleep architecture and daytime energy — typically develop over 2–4 weeks of consistent use.

Yes. This formula is formulated with natural adaptogens and minerals that are safe for nightly use. It's non-habit forming and contains no sedatives or synthetic compounds.

This supplement is designed to complement your existing supplement stack. If you're on prescription medication, we recommend checking with your doctor before starting any new supplement.

Take two capsules with water 30–60 minutes before your intended bedtime for best results.

We offer a 60-day money-back guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied for any reason, contact our team for a full refund — no questions asked.

Yes. This product is 100% vegan, gluten-free, and free from artificial colors, flavors, and preservatives.

One bottle contains a 30-day supply (60 capsules at 2 capsules per night). Subscribe and save for the best price.

Our product is manufactured in the USA in an FDA-registered, GMP-certified facility. Every batch is third-party tested for purity and potency.

Very different. Melatonin only signals your body to sleep — it doesn't address the cortisol and nervous system issues that prevent you from actually falling or staying asleep. [Product] targets the root causes.
